word: G3471 - μωραίνω - mōraínō - mo-rah'-ee-no - Become fool

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μωραίνω

- Transliteration: Moraino

- Phonetic: mo-rah'-ee-no

- Definition:

1. to be foolish, to act foolishly

a. to make foolish

1. to prove a person or a thing foolish

b. to make flat and tasteless

1. of salt that has lost its strength and flavour

- Origin: from G3474

- TDNT entry: 17:52,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3474; to become insipid; figuratively to make (passively act) as a simpleton: - become fool make foolish lose savour.
